API_CHANGE_ERROR: An error has been detected. It is impossible to change it!
COOLDOWN: <:clock:819537888450314280> Wait a second, you're going too fast! try again in **{time}s**
COMMAND_HAS_NOT_IMAGE: This command has no image yet.
NSFW_CHANNEL: This isn't a **NSFW** channel. You can switch it on, using Lulu's commands `{prefix} nsfw` or into discord channel settings!
BAD_PERMISSION: You haven't the required permission to do that!
PREFIX_MISSING: You must to write a new prefix to change it!
PREFIX_CHANGED: The new prefix has been saved and changed!
NEW_PREFIX_EQUAL_TO_CURRENT: The new prefix cannot be equal to the current!
COLOR_MISSING: You must to write an hex color `{defaultColor}`.
NEW_COLOR_EQUAL_TO_CURRENT: The new color cannot be equal to the current!
COLOR_INVALID: This entry is not a hex color!
COLOR_CHANGED: The new color has been changed!
NEW_LANG_EQUAL_TO_CURRENT: The new language cannot be equal to the current!
LANG_BAD_KEY: The language you entered is invalid. Try with a valid one!
LANG_CHANGED: The new language has been saved and changed!
NSFW_ENABLED: You have `enabled` the **NSFW (Not safe for work)** on this channel.
NSFW_DISABLE: You have `disabled` the **NSFW (Not safe for work)** on this channel.
COMMAND_DISABLED: {information} This command has been disabled temporarily or permanently!
COMMAND_DEVELOPERS: {information} This command is only reserved to developers!
MESSAGE_AUTOMATICALLY_REMOVED: Automatic deletion of the message in {time}s
USER_NOT_FOUND: {warning} Tag a member or member not found!
COMMAND_ADMIN_ARG: {warning} The first argument cannot be null! Choose between `add`, `update` or `remove`
COMMAND_ADMIN_COMMAND_NAME: {warning} The command `name` cannot be null! Choose a command name
COMMAND_ADMIN_COMMAND_CREATE: {success} The command `{commandName}` has been successfully created!
COMMAND_ADMIN_COMMAND_TYPE: {warning} The command `type` cannot be null! Choose a command name
COMMAND_ADMIN_COMMAND_TYPE_CREATED: {success} The type `{type}` has been successfully created!
COMMAND_ADMIN_COMMAND_TYPE_NOT_EXIST: {information} The command `type`: `{commandType}` does not exist. Do you want to create it?
HELP: :mailbox_with_mail: The help commands has been sent to your dm
PURGE_NUMBER: {warning} You must to write a number between 1 and 1000!
PURGE_FOURTEEN_DAYS: {warning} Unable to delete 14 day old messages
PURGE_SUCCESS_DELETE_ONE: {success} One message has been send to the end of the world
PURGE_SUCCESS_DELETE_MULTIPLE: {success} {messages} messages has been send to greet the Devil
PURGE_SUCCESS_DELETE: {danger} {messages} messages has been send to greet the Devil
PURGE_SUCCESS_DELETE_MULTIPLE_OLD_ONE: {success} {messages} messages has been send to greet the Devil but One message could not be deleted
PURGE_SUCCESS_DELETE_MULTIPLE_OLD_MULTIP: {success} {messages} messages has been send to greet the Devil but {oldMessage} messages could not be deleted
WARN_REASON_BIG: {warning} The reason of the warn must not exceed 100 characters
MUSIC_VOLUME: {danger} You can adjust the volume between 1 and 100
MUSIC_NEXT_SONG:

**{members}** people in the channel.
MUSIC_CANT_SKIP: {warning} You cannot skip the music because is no more music in the queue
MUSIC_CANT_USE_SAME_CHANNEL: {warning} You can't use this command if you are not in the same voice channel!
MUSIC_CANT_USE_NOT_JOINED_CHANNEL: {warning} You can't use this command if i'm not in a voice channel!
MUSIC_@ME_CHANNEL: {warning} You must first join a vocal channel!
MUSIC_@ME_SAME_BOT: {warning} You must be in the same voice channel to play music!
MUSIC_JOIN_ANOTHER: {warning} I can join your voice channel because i'm already in voice channel with people
